meaning: 1. traffic police; 2. abbr. to 交警
sentence: 路口的交通警察正在指挥车流。
pinyin: Lùkǒu de jiāotōng jǐngchá zhèngzài zhǐhuī chēliú.
english: The traffic police at the intersection are directing the traffic.

sentence: 她每天早上打坐二十分钟来放松身心。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dǎzuò èrshí fēnzhōng lái fàngsōng shēnxīn.
english: She meditates for twenty minutes every morning to relax body and mind.

sentence: 计划生育政策在中国实行了几十年。
pinyin: Jìhuà shēngyù zhèngcè zài Zhōngguó shíxíng le jǐ shí nián.
english: The family planning policy was implemented in China for several decades.

meaning: to come by; to obtain through some means
sentence: 这份工作是他努力得来的。
pinyin: Zhè fèn gōngzuò shì tā nǔlì délái de.
english: He earned this job through his own hard work.

meaning: web feed; news feed; syndicated feed
sentence: 他订阅了多个消息来源，随时掌握最新资讯。
pinyin: Tā dìngyuèle duō gè xiāoxi láiyuán, suíshí zhǎngwò zuìxīn zīxùn.
english: He subscribes to several news feeds to stay up to date with the latest information.
